name: Smarsh Digital Communications Compliance REST API
what_it_does: Smarsh digital communications compliance REST API for regulated industries to automate electronic communications capture, archive, supervision, and e-discovery workflows — enabling AI agents to search archived communications across email, chat, and social platforms, manage supervision workflows, export data for regulatory inquiries, and monitor capture channel health through Smarsh's intelligent compliance platform. Enables AI agents to manage archive management for multi-channel communication archive search and retrieval automation, handle supervision management for AI-assisted review workflow assignment and completion tracking automation, access export management for regulatory e-discovery production and litigation hold export automation, retrieve capture management for communication channel connection and capture completeness monitoring automation, manage policy management for supervision lexicon and compliance policy configuration management automation, handle user management for employee communication profile and archive access permissions automation, access analytics management for compliance risk score and supervision pattern analytics automation, retrieve integration management for Microsoft 365, Slack, Zoom, and enterprise communication platform capture integration status, manage report management for regulatory compliance coverage and supervision performance reporting automation, and integrate Smarsh with SEC, FINRA, FCA, and regulatory reporting platforms for intelligent communications compliance automation.
use_cases: Searching multi-channel archived communications for regulatory examination and investigation response agents
Managing AI-assisted supervisory review workflows for broker-dealer compliance operations agents
Exporting communications for e-discovery and litigation hold production for legal and compliance agents
Monitoring real-time capture status across all communication channels for compliance assurance agents
not_for: General email and collaboration platform management (Smarsh is compliance archiving; Microsoft 365 and Google Workspace serve enterprise communication)
Security threat detection in communications (Smarsh is regulatory compliance archiving; Proofpoint and Abnormal serve email security)
Customer communication management (Smarsh is employee compliance archive; Salesforce and Genesys serve customer communication)
best_when: A financial services, healthcare, or regulated industry compliance team wanting AI agents to automate multi-channel communication archive search, supervisory review management, and e-discovery through Smarsh's AI-powered intelligent compliance platform.
avoid_when: REGULATED INDUSTRY CONTEXT REQUIRED: Smarsh serves regulated industries (financial services, healthcare, legal); automated general-purpose assumption creates compliance_context_missing for deployments without applicable communications compliance regulations; automated must understand SEC, FINRA, HIPAA, or applicable regulatory requirements. SMARSH ENTERPRISE LICENSE IS REQUIRED: Smarsh serves enterprises; automated open-developer assumption creates account_required for organizations without Smarsh enterprise agreement; automated must have Smarsh subscription. CHANNEL CONNECTORS REQUIRE INDIVIDUAL SETUP: Each communication channel (email, Bloomberg, Slack, WhatsApp, Teams) requires separate connector configuration; automated all-channels assumption creates capture_gap for channels not individually configured in Smarsh; automated must configure each channel connector for capture coverage. AI SUPERVISION REQUIRES TRAINING: Smarsh AI-assisted supervision requires model training on firm-specific compliance lexicons; automated out-of-box-AI assumption creates low_detection_accuracy for AI supervision without firm-specific training and tuning; automated should configure and validate supervision models before production deployment.

auth.notes: Smarsh uses API key and OAuth2 for Communications Compliance REST API. REST API with JSON. Portland, OR HQ. Founded 2001 by Stephen Marsh. Raised $1B+ (Francisco Partners, Golub Capital). Products: Smarsh Connected Archive, Smarsh Intelligent Supervision, Smarsh eDiscovery. 6,500+ customers. Industries: financial services (70%), corporate, healthcare, government. Capture 80+ communication channels. AI-powered supervision with NLP. Competes with Global Relay, Proofpoint Archive, and Microsoft Purview for digital communications compliance.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No public free tier; enterprise subscription required
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-user annual subscription; archive, supervision, and e-discovery modules; enterprise custom pricing
pricing.notes: Portland OR. $1B+ raised (Francisco Partners). 6,500+ customers. Per-user annual subscription. 80+ capture channels.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API token; archive search APIs throttled per subscription and query complexity

known_agent_gotchas: SEARCH QUERIES REQUIRE DATE BOUNDING: Smarsh archive search on large archives requires date range constraints; automated unbounded-search assumption creates query_timeout for searches without date range parameters on multi-year archives; automated must always specify date range for archive search operations

EXPORT JOBS ARE LONG-RUNNING: Regulatory data exports can take hours to days for large date ranges; automated synchronous-export assumption creates timeout for result queries before export job completes; automated must implement long-running job polling with appropriate timeout thresholds for export operations

SUPERVISION REVIEW STATE IS WORKFLOW-MANAGED: Communications in supervision workflow have states (new, in_review, reviewed, escalated); automated unstateful assumption creates workflow_conflict for supervision operations that ignore review state; automated must check and respect supervision workflow state before taking actions

CAPTURE GAPS MUST BE MONITORED: Smarsh capture may have connectivity gaps for any channel; automated always-complete-capture assumption creates compliance_gap for organizations not monitoring capture channel health; automated should regularly check channel capture status for completeness assurance

DATA RESIDENCY AFFECTS API ENDPOINT: Smarsh operates regional data centers (US, EU, UK) for data residency; automated single-endpoint assumption creates data_residency_violation for accounts storing data in region different from API endpoint used; automated must use region-appropriate API endpoint
agent_readiness.security_notes: Communications compliance archiving. SOC2, GDPR, SEC/FINRA/HIPAA. API key/OAuth2. US/EU/UK. Archived employee communications (highly sensitive, regulated).

security_score_components.security_notes: Communications compliance. SOC2, GDPR, SEC/FINRA/HIPAA. API key/OAuth2. US/EU/UK. Employee communications archive data (regulated).
